positive: A stylized, minimalist mountainscape illustration featuring a central, sharp silhouette of a jagged peak under a vibrant sunset sky. The foreground includes geometric representations of pine trees and a winding river path. Use a color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, terracotta, and slate blue. Style should be vector art inspired, clean linework, high contrast, excellent for direct apparel printing, symmetrical or near-symmetrical composition, vibrant yet harmonious color gradients, graphic design quality, flat lay illustration.
